allow: Bash(git commit -q -m 'QA fixes: decouple battle engine from mock provider \(BattleScriptSource\), move scenarios to 2026-07-18 Opening Bell, memoize scripts *)
Bash(grep -iE "error|warn|unhandled|exception|failed" /tmp/dev3987.log | grep -viE "onDemandEntries|compiled|ready|Local:|Network:" | head -20; echo "---exit scan done---")

Bash(node -e "const l=require\('lucide-react'\); for\(const n of ['Trophy','Swords','Sword','Flame','Medal','Shield','AlarmClock','Activity','TrendingUp','CheckCircle','CircleCheck','Award','Bell','Filter','ChevronDown','Building2','Users','Star','Crown','Lock','ArrowUpRight','ArrowDownRight','Trophy']\) console.log\(n, typeof l[n]\);")
Bash(node -e "const r=require\('radix-ui'\); console.log\('Popover', typeof r.Popover, r.Popover && Object.keys\(r.Popover\)\); console.log\('DropdownMenu', typeof r.DropdownMenu\);")
